decision_log.decision: Parsed alert and queried DBT_RUN_RESULTS for error details
decision_log.rationale: Alert text contains model cs_chatbot_conversation_agg from transform_cx__daily DAG. DBT_RUN_RESULTS confirms SQL compilation error with invalid identifier CONVERSATIONID (error code 000904).

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, STATUS, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'cs_chatbot_conversation_agg' AND STATUS = 'error' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
